## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue(s) above
- [ ] Tests for new behavior
- [ ] Docs updated if protocol/interface changed
- [ ] CI green on all three OSes
- [ ] No new dependencies without discussion
- [ ] If this changes an artifact schema or protocol — there's a linked design spike Decision
